description: DIAKRISIS coherence-measure constants and monitor thresholds (spec §2.7, §6). All for the base 7-cell unless noted.

coherence_measures.comment: Gamma_net = C/N (C = correlation matrix, unit diagonal). Phi = sum_{i!=j}|g_ij|^2 / sum_i g_ii^2; P = Tr(Gamma^2); R = 1/(N*P).

equicorrelated_stratum.comment: All off-diagonal correlations equal to r. These closed forms are verified against the matrix measures (V15).

leading_indicator.comment: V17: on the physical domain (Gamma PSD, Tr=1) the failure region {P < 2/N} is contained in {Phi < 1}. The integration alarm fires no later than the structure alarm.

collective_subject_window.comment: V19: a 7-agent cell is a candidate unified subject iff its mean inter-agent correlation lies in this half-open interval.

first_order_blindness.comment: V11: the sum of the seven Fano line-adjacency matrices equals J - I (the complete graph K7). Its spectrum makes pairwise monitoring structure-blind.

partition_fiedler.comment: V14: algebraic connectivity (second-smallest Laplacian eigenvalue) of the health-weighted collinearity graph.

self_healing.comment: V16, §6.7-6.8. Each coarse cross-segment hop contracts coherences by 1/3, hence integration Phi by 1/9. Diagnosis has a floor at one third of cycles.
